creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to lbartoletti from comment #3)

> Since py-qtconsole is only required by devel/py-spyder (py36 qt5)

py-qtconsole is usable by itself.

> I agree to switch devel/py-qtconsole to qt5 (and py36 too ?).

I'm not sure what you mean here.

> Sorry to reopen this issue, I have build (and run jupyter-qtconsole / import qtconsole ) it on 11.1 with latest pkg.

Are you saying you switched py-qtconsole to pyqt:5 and ran it and didn't see the error I posted?
